nextstep.auto.dialog: Running the command above will trigger a Finder confirmation dialog — click 'Empty Trash' there to actually clear it.
nextstep.auto.thirty: macOS auto-empties 30 days after items enter the Trash if you've enabled Finder → Settings → Advanced → 'Remove items from the Trash after 30 days'.
nextstep.allgood: All freed bytes are immediately reclaimed — no follow-up needed.
